# Load the text to analyze
path = '/mnt/data/file-W2JGVjqpP2KqcPsQznNtd9-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

import re

text = open('/mnt/data/file-W2JGVjqpP2KqcPsQznNtd9-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

# Helper to find all indices of a substring
def find_all(text, sub):
    starts = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(sub, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        starts.append(i)
        start = i + 1
    return starts

# Known ayah substrings appearing in text (various variants)
ayah_variants = [
    "أَفَلَا يَتَدَبَّرُونَ الْقُرْآنَ وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِنْدِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا",
    "كِتَابٌ أَنْزَلْنَاهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَارَكٌ لِيَدَّبَّرُوا آيَاتِهِ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ",
    "أَفَلا يَتَدَبَّرُونَ الْقُرْآنَ وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِنْدِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلافاً كَثِيراً",
    "كِتَابٌ أَنْزَلْنَاهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَارَكٌ لِيَدَّبَّرُوا آيَاتِهِ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ", # same as 2 (keep)
    "أفلا يتدبرون القرآن",
    "كتاب أنزلناه إليك مبارك ليدبروا آياته وليتذكر أولو الألباب",
]

for sub in ayah_variants:
    idxs = find_all(text, sub)
    if idxs:
        print(sub, idxs, [ (i, i+len(sub)) for i in idxs])

# Find hadith paraphrase segments
starts1 = find_all(text, "صليت مع النبي")
starts1

for s,e in h1_spans:
    print(s,e, "\n", text[s:e], "\n----")

h2_spans = [extract_span_ending_with(text, s, "تعوذ.") for s in starts2]
[(s,e,text[s:e]) for (s,e) in h2_spans]

import os, textwrap, json, itertools, sys, glob, pathlib, pprint, re
files = os.listdir('/mnt/data')
files[:50]

# Build the list of citations with spans collected.
citations = []

# Helper to add an Aya citation
def add_aya_span(start, end, sura_name, sura_number, aya_number):
    span_text = text[start:end]
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,  # will set after validation; since we can't validate, keep False
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": sura_name,
            "sura_number": sura_number,
            "aya_number": aya_number
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    })

# Helper to add a Hadith citation
def add_hadith_span(start, end, collection_name=None, book_number=None, hadith_number=None):
    span_text = text[start:end]
    hadeeth_ref = {}
    if collection_name:
        hadeeth_ref["collection_name"] = collection_name
    if book_number is not None:
        hadeeth_ref["book_number"] = book_number
    if hadith_number is not None:
        hadeeth_ref["hadith_number"] = hadith_number
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": hadeeth_ref,
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    })

# Add Aya spans
add_aya_span(183, 294, "النساء", 4, 82)
add_aya_span(445, 545, "ص", 38, 29)
add_aya_span(1673, 1773, "ص", 38, 29)
add_aya_span(1966, 2077, "النساء", 4, 82)
add_aya_span(2577, 2686, "النساء", 4, 82)
add_aya_span(2712, 2812, "ص", 38, 29)
add_aya_span(3242, 3261, "النساء", 4, 82)
add_aya_span(3281, 3339, "ص", 38, 29)

# Add Hadith spans
add_hadith_span(741, 922, "Sahih Muslim")
add_hadith_span(990, 1113, "Sunan Abi Dawud")
add_hadith_span(3376, 3561, "Sahih Muslim")
add_hadith_span(3626, 3751, "Sunan Abi Dawud")

len(citations)

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
